name: Ashok Kumar
bio: I am a PhD candidate at the Telfer School of Management, University of Ottawa, specializing in Digital Transformation and Innovation. I did my Bachelor's from IIT Kharagpur (both in 2022) and joined the PhD program immediately after graduation.

During my undergrad studies, I have done various research projects at Telfer School of Management and IIT Kharagpur. My current research interest explores the intersection of finance and natural language processing, where I apply neural networks to analyze large-scale textual data.
